# It's Fixed
> Trusted local handyman serving Walnut Creek, CA. Honest pricing, on-time service, and quality work on every job.

## Business
- Name: It's Fixed
- Type: HomeAndConstructionBusiness
- Phone: (925) 286-5717
- Address: Walnut Creek, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
- Area Served: Walnut Creek and Contra Costa County
- Website: https://yourwebsiteexample.com/itsfixed/

## Services
- General Handyman
- Drywall Repair
- Furniture Assembly
- Electrical Work
- Plumbing Fixtures
- Kitchen Repairs
- Bathroom Repairs

## Frequently Asked Questions
**What handyman services do you offer?**
We handle a wide range of home repairs including drywall, furniture assembly, fixture installation, minor electrical and plumbing, door and window repairs, caulking, painting prep, and general maintenance.

**How much does a handyman cost in Walnut Creek?**
Most handyman jobs in Walnut Creek are priced per project rather than hourly. Small jobs typically run $75 to $200. We provide clear pricing before any work begins so there are no surprises.

**Do you offer same-day or emergency service?**
We do our best to accommodate urgent requests. Contact us directly at (925) 286-5717 and we will let you know our earliest availability.

**Are you licensed and insured?**
Yes. We are fully insured for all handyman work in California. We carry liability insurance on every job for your peace of mind.

**What areas near Walnut Creek do you serve?**
We serve Walnut Creek, Concord, Pleasant Hill, Lafayette, Orinda, Moraga, Danville, and surrounding Contra Costa County communities.
